chunks:
Below are a few snapshots that will help you fill in your application form accurately. 
 
1. Select your graduation year corresponding to the position you are applying for.  
 
2. Select your CGPA digits. For eg. If your CGPA is 8.99, select 8 in the below question. Please add 
the corresponding decimals in the next question.  
 

 
3. Select the corresponding decimals in the below question. For eg. If your CGPA is 8.99, please 
select .99 in the below question.  
 
This is how your CGPA should look in the application form if your CGPA is 8.99.  
DO NOT ROUND OFF YOUR CGPA
